steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The goal explicitly asks to emphasize a similarity between the two specimens. From the notes, the key shared fact is that both Sue and Big Mike are members of the genus Tyrannosaurus — this is the defining similarity that the correct choice must highlight.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C directly accomplishes the goal by using both to state that Sue and Big Mike share the same genus membership (Tyrannosaurus), emphasizing their similarity. A and B mention only one specimen each, and D contrasts their locations with While rather than highlighting shared traits.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
